subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto the Ancient Lord, Who hath perfumed the world with the fragrance that wafted, by His command, from the direction of Hijaz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمالک القدم الذی عطر العالم من عرف فاح بامره من شطر الحجاز و
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
